features: Christmas Metallic Bows Assorted Sizes 16 Pack
Elevate your gift-giving experience this holiday season with our Christmas Metallic Bows Assorted Sizes 16 Pack.
This exquisite collection features a stunning array of colours, including shimmering gold, elegant silver, and vibrant red, ensuring your presents stand out under the tree.
Each pack contains bows in three versatile sizes—approximately 4 x 8cm, 4 x 6cm, and 8 x 5cm in diameter—allowing you to perfectly adorn gifts of all shapes and sizes.
The self-adhesive backing makes application a breeze, saving you time and effort while ensuring a polished finish.
Whether you're wrapping gifts for family, friends, or colleagues, these metallic bows add a touch of festive flair that will delight recipients and enhance the joy of giving.
Make your holiday preparations effortless and stylish with this essential accessory for your gift-wrapping needs.
